title: Enterprise Custom CMS (ARC) & Backend Platform
productDescription: A bespoke, multi-tenant headless Content Management System (ARC) and backend platform, including a custom inventory database, built to power corporate websites and streamline marketing operations for a $1B+ revenue company.
role: Technical Product Manager (Product Lead & Key Developer)
challenge: Reduce dependency on third-party vendors, enhance internal content management capabilities, centralize inventory data, improve website performance, and provide a scalable platform for core marketing operations.
action: Led product strategy and Agile delivery. Spearheaded the full lifecycle from ideation and blueprinting to hands-on development (Node.js for backend components, Next.js for admin interfaces) and launch. Managed overseas developers and directly contributed to coding, system architecture, and database design (MongoDB).
results: Launched robust CMS & backend supporting $1B+ annual revenue.
Delivered core project 30% under budget, saving $75K.
Minimized third-party vendor dependency (e.g., for inventory data via BDX), improving operational flexibility and control.
Enabled dynamic and customized feeds for key marketing platforms (HubSpot, Zillow, Facebook).
Improved data flexibility and streamlined development of new tools reliant on centralized inventory.
keyFeatures: Advanced API for integrations and dynamic content delivery
Dynamic content modeling and management capabilities

title: Corporate Websites Front-End Platform (Next.js)
productDescription: A suite of high-performance, responsive corporate websites built with Next.js, leveraging the ARC headless CMS to drive lead generation and enhance user engagement for Brightland Homes.
role: Technical Product Manager (Product Lead & Key Developer)
challenge: Develop new corporate websites that effectively support marketing operations, significantly improve user engagement and technical performance, and seamlessly integrate with the new ARC headless CMS.
action: Spearheaded the development and launch of multiple custom corporate websites using Next.js. Focused on UI/UX, hands-on technical implementation, performance optimization (static site generation, revalidation logic), and SEO.
results: Improved PageSpeed Insights from 30 to 60-99 points.
Increased user engagement time by 40% and overall user count by approx. 30%.
Boosted organic search clicks by 2x by resolving SEO issues post-launch.
Contributed to the platform infrastructure supporting over $1 billion in annual revenue.
keyFeatures: Dynamic content driven by ARC headless CMS
Optimized for speed (Static Site Generation, Revalidation)

title: Digital TV Signage Platform Transformation (Next.js)
productDescription: A modernized digital TV signage platform for sales centers, featuring a custom-built Next.js website, interactive content, lead capture, and centralized management, integrated with a cost-effective hardware solution.
role: Web Specialist (acting as Product Manager & Lead Developer)
challenge: Overhaul an outdated, unstable TV signage platform reliant on obsolete technology and expensive hardware, which limited feature development and incurred high costs.
action: Architected a cost-effective mini-PC hardware solution. Rebuilt the TV signage website from scratch using Next.js, implementing QR code lead capture and admin tools for cross-selling. Designed hardware configurations for 150+ touchscreen devices.
results: Avoided $300,000 in hardware replacement costs.
Boosted lead generation by 8% through new website functionalities.
Eliminated previous hardware limitations, enabling new feature development.
Enhanced sales team capabilities with interactive tools.
keyFeatures: Custom Next.js web application for TV display
Centralized admin tools for content management & cross-selling

title: ARC Connect - Multi-Org HubSpot & AWS Integration Hub
productDescription: A custom Node.js application (ARC Connect) serving as a central hub for complex API integrations, specifically enabling multi-organization HubSpot support within the ARC CMS, leveraging AWS for scalability and automated data sharing.
challenge: Enable the ARC CMS to support multiple distinct HubSpot organizations, requiring sophisticated data association, formatting, and synchronization across different accounts while maintaining system efficiency and scalability.
action: Architected and implemented ARC Connect (Node.js, Express), integrating it into the existing ARC infrastructure. Developed custom workflows and connections to manage data associations and formatting. Utilized AWS services for robust and scalable data handling.
results: Successfully integrated multiple HubSpot accounts with a unified setup within ARC.
Enhanced product catalog and lead synchronization to support multiple organizations.
Improved overall system efficiency and scalability for multi-org operations.
Streamlined marketing and sales operations through automated data flow.
keyFeatures: Custom Node.js REST API development for integration
Automated data sharing and synchronization workflows
Deep HubSpot API utilization (OAuth 2.0, Custom Objects)

title: Southern Impression (SI) Homes WordPress Website
productDescription: A new, performant, and secure WordPress website built from scratch for Southern Impression Homes, a subsidiary of Brightland Homes, as part of a strategic reorganization.
challenge: Rapidly develop and launch a new, independent web presence for a subsidiary, ensuring high performance, security, and alignment with specific business needs following a reorganization.
action: Solely designed, developed, and launched the new WordPress website from scratch. Focused on custom theme development, performance optimization (achieving significant Lighthouse score improvements), security best practices, and integrating specific tracking and business requirements for SI Homes.
results: Successfully launched a new, fully functional website for the subsidiary.
Improved Lighthouse performance scores from a baseline of 6/25 (on previous attempts/placeholder) to 80-99.
Delivered a secure and effective online presence tailored to the subsidiary's needs.
keyFeatures: Custom WordPress theme and plugin development
Tailored content structure for subsidiary needs

title: HubSpot Advanced CRM Customizations & Automation Suite
productDescription: A suite of custom-developed programmable modules, custom objects, and automated workflows within HubSpot CRM, designed to significantly enhance marketing team efficiency and campaign effectiveness.
challenge: Improve marketing team productivity and campaign personalization by streamlining repetitive tasks, enhancing CRM data utilization, and automating key marketing workflows within HubSpot.
action: Designed and actively implemented advanced CRM customizations including programmable email modules for dynamic content, custom objects for nuanced data management, custom workflow actions (e.g., phone formatting, name capitalization), and API-based reporting solutions (e.g., 'Meetings by Community' reports).
results: Boosted marketing productivity by 15% (measured by campaign efficiency).
Optimized marketing team time by 10% via automation (e.g., inventory pricing emails).
Streamlined designer workflows and improved overall marketing team output.
Achieved $700/month savings from automated phone formatting workflows.
keyFeatures: HubSpot custom objects for advanced data modeling
Automated workflows for marketing and data tasks
